positive: A minimalist, abstract line-art depiction of a forest creature—a stylized fox or wolf—in a peaceful, upright, symmetrical pose. The design should use clean, single-weight black lines on a clean white background, creating a strong silhouette effect. Incorporate geometric, flowing organic shapes that resemble celestial elements (e.g., crescent moons, scattered stars, constellations) flowing around the central animal figure. The composition must be centered and visually balanced, perfect for apparel printing. Style should evoke modern tattoo art meets Nordic folk mythology. Use deep indigo and earthy terracotta accents sparingly, primarily as outlines or fill washes, to add depth to the line work. The overall aesthetic should be serene, sophisticated, and highly graphic.
negative: photorealistic, complex shading, gradient, solid background color, text, watermark, messy, blurry, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low resolution, noise, clutter, dirty lines, logos, trademarks, copyright
